The girl on the left wears a shirt with the text 'Hear'.

spatial: The girl with the 'Hear' shirt is to the left of the girl with the monkey graphic shirt. Both girls are in front of a background that is split between blue polka dots and green stripes.

visible_entities.desc: Girl with dark hair in pigtails, wearing a black sequined bow and a gold sequined bow, dressed in a pink long-sleeved shirt with black cursive text
Girl with long dark wavy hair, wearing a large pink bow with white patterns, dressed in a pink long-sleeved shirt with a cartoon graphic
Background featuring blue polka-dot wallpaper on the left and green vertical striped wallpaper on the right

atomic_facts.fact: Two girls stand side-by-side facing the camera.
The girl on the left wears a shirt with the text 'Hear' visible.
The girl on the right wears a shirt featuring a cartoon character with a green bow.

spatial: The girl with the pigtails is to the left of the girl with the large pink bow. The blue polka-dot background is behind the girl on the left, while the green striped background is behind the girl on the right.
